---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

<!--
For open-ended ideas or "would this be possible?" questions, GitHub
Discussions is often the better place -- feature issues work best when
the ask is concrete. Accessibility needs are this project's first
priority; if a missing capability blocks hands-free use for you,
say so in the first line.
-->

**The problem**

What are you trying to do that WheelHouse can't do today, or makes
harder than it should be?

**Proposed solution**

What you'd like to happen. For new voice commands, include the exact
words you'd want to say.

**Alternatives considered**

Workarounds you use today, or other shapes the feature could take.
(Check the built-in Pattern Manager first -- many command ideas can be
built as user patterns without a code change.)

**Anything else**

Context, examples from other tools, hardware specifics.
